title: Två kvinnor
writer: Torsten Quensel, Francis Carco, Roger Richebé
actors: Eva Dahlbeck, Cécile Ossbahr, Gunnar Björnstrand
plot: Cecilia is in hospital after being subjected to an attempt on her life. Her husband is called to the hospital. Cecilia deliriously mentions a mutual friend. The husband seeks out the friend.
